attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 SLSCDT.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY
 ,SLSCDT.SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD
 ,SLSCDT.SALES_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG
 ,SLSCDT.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_MODE_CD
 ,SLSCDT.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT
 ,SLSCDT.OVERLAY_TYPE
 ,SLSCDT.BK_SALES_REP_NUM
 ,SLSCDT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD
 ,SLSCDT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
 ,SLSCDT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,SLSCDT.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT
 ,SLSCDT.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_NAME
 ,SLSCDT.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_TYPE_CD
 ,SLSCDT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
 ,SLSCDT.BK_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME
 ,SLSCDT.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMT_RSN_CD
 ,SLSCDT.SCA_CREATE_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_SCA_CREATE_DT
 ,SLSCDT.SCA_LAST_UPDATE_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_SCA_LAST_UPDATE_DT
 ,SLSCDT.SPLIT_PCT
 ,SLSCDT.EFFECTIVE_START_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_EFFECTIVE_START_DT
 ,SLSCDT.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_EFFECTIVE_END_DT
 ,SLSCDT.RU_REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG
 ,SLSCDT.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
 ,SLSCDT.EDW_CREATE_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,SLSCDT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,SLSCDT.UCRM_CASE_NUM
 ,'I' AS SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD
 ,BRDG.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT AS SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
 ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,CAST(BRDG.ACTION_CD AS VARCHAR(9))AS ACTION_CD
 ,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
 FROM
 $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SLSCDT_ASGN_SLSTRX_NRT SLSCDT
 INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XAAS_TRX_NRT_BKG_BRIDGE BRD 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BRD.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT 
 ORDER BY BRD.ACTION_CD ASC,BRD.LAST_UPDATE_DTM DESC)=1) BRDG
 ON SLSCDT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=BRDG.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
 /*INNER JOIN (SELECT NATL_IN.* FROM 
  (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID ='wf_WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS') X,
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL_IN
 WHERE NATL_IN.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME>X.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE) NATL */  
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
  ON BRDG.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT = NATL.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
  AND NATL.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT<>(-999)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
       ON( NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
       AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
       AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )
 WHERE BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD = 'DR'
 AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE NOT IN ('CM')
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS_TV WI 
 WHERE WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
 /* Q2FY19 Dec Rel : Included below not exists to exclude XAAS Non reference trx */
/* can use EL_XAAS_TRX_FROM_XAAS_SC , but need to set TES dependency on wf_WI_REV_SCA_NRT_TV */
 AND NOT EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
		          WHERE NATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
				  AND EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
                  AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
                  AND EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10 IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE')
				 )
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT
 SLSCDT.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY
 ,SLSCDT.SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD
 ,SLSCDT.SALES_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG
 ,SLSCDT.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_MODE_CD
 ,SLSCDT.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT
 ,SLSCDT.OVERLAY_TYPE
 ,SLSCDT.BK_SALES_REP_NUM
 ,SLSCDT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD
 ,SLSCDT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
 ,SLSCDT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,SLSCDT.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT
 ,SLSCDT.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_NAME
 ,SLSCDT.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_TYPE_CD
 ,SLSCDT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
 ,SLSCDT.BK_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME
 ,SLSCDT.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMT_RSN_CD
 ,SLSCDT.SCA_CREATE_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_SCA_CREATE_DT
 ,SLSCDT.SCA_LAST_UPDATE_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_SCA_LAST_UPDATE_DT
 ,SLSCDT.SPLIT_PCT
 ,SLSCDT.EFFECTIVE_START_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_EFFECTIVE_START_DT
 ,SLSCDT.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_EFFECTIVE_END_DT
 ,SLSCDT.RU_REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG
 ,SLSCDT.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
 ,SLSCDT.EDW_CREATE_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,SLSCDT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,SLSCDT.UCRM_CASE_NUM
 ,'C' AS SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD
 ,BRDG.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT AS SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
 ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,CAST(BRDG.ACTION_CD AS VARCHAR(9)) AS ACTION_CD
 ,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
 FROM
 $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SLSCDT_ASGN_SLSTRX_NRT SLSCDT
  INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XAAS_TRX_NRT_BKG_BRIDGE BRD 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BRD.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT 
 ORDER BY BRD.ACTION_CD DESC,BRD.LAST_UPDATE_DTM DESC)=1) BRDG
 ON SLSCDT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=BRDG.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
 /*INNER JOIN (SELECT NATL_IN.* FROM 
  (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID ='wf_WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS') X,
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL_IN
 WHERE (NATL_IN.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME>X.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE) ) NATL  */
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
  ON BRDG.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT = NATL.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
  AND NATL.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT<>(-999)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
       ON( NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
       AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
       AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )
 WHERE BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD = 'DR'
 AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM')                       
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS_TV WI WHERE WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
 /* Q2FY19 Dec Rel : Included below not exists to exclude XAAS Non reference trx */
/* can use EL_XAAS_TRX_FROM_XAAS_SC , but need to set TES dependency on wf_WI_REV_SCA_NRT_TV */
 AND NOT EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
		          WHERE NATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
				  AND EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
                  AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
                  AND EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10 IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE')
				 )

SELECT
 WI.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY
 ,WI.SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD
 ,WI.SALES_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG
 ,WI.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_MODE_CD
 ,WI.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT
 ,WI.OVERLAY_TYPE
 ,WI.BK_SALES_REP_NUM
 ,WI.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD
 ,WI.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
 ,WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,WI.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT
 ,WI.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_NAME
 ,WI.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_TYPE_CD
 ,WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
 ,WI.BK_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME
 ,WI.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMT_RSN_CD
 ,WI.SCA_CREATE_DTM
 ,WI.DV_SCA_CREATE_DT
 ,WI.SCA_LAST_UPDATE_DTM
 ,WI.DV_SCA_LAST_UPDATE_DT
 ,WI.SPLIT_PCT
 ,WI.EFFECTIVE_START_DTM
 ,WI.DV_EFFECTIVE_START_DT
 ,WI.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM
 ,WI.DV_EFFECTIVE_END_DT
 ,WI.RU_REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG
 ,WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
 ,WI.DV_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
 ,WI.EDW_CREATE_DTM
 ,WI.EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM
 ,WI.EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,WI.UCRM_CASE_NUM
 ,WI.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD
 ,WI.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT AS SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
 ,WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,WI.ACTION_CD
 ,WI.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_ACV_EXIST WI

SELECT
 SLSCDT.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY
 ,SLSCDT.SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD
 ,SLSCDT.SALES_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG
 ,SLSCDT.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_MODE_CD
 ,SLSCDT.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT
 ,SLSCDT.OVERLAY_TYPE
 ,SLSCDT.BK_SALES_REP_NUM
 ,SLSCDT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD
 ,SLSCDT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
 ,SLSCDT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,SLSCDT.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT
 ,SLSCDT.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_NAME
 ,SLSCDT.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_TYPE_CD
 ,SLSCDT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
 ,SLSCDT.BK_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME
 ,SLSCDT.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMT_RSN_CD
 ,SLSCDT.SCA_CREATE_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_SCA_CREATE_DT
 ,SLSCDT.SCA_LAST_UPDATE_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_SCA_LAST_UPDATE_DT
 ,SLSCDT.SPLIT_PCT
 ,SLSCDT.EFFECTIVE_START_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_EFFECTIVE_START_DT
 ,SLSCDT.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_EFFECTIVE_END_DT
 ,SLSCDT.RU_REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG
 ,SLSCDT.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.DV_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
 ,SLSCDT.EDW_CREATE_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,SLSCDT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM
 ,SLSCDT.EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,SLSCDT.UCRM_CASE_NUM
 ,BRDG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD
 ,BRDG.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT AS SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
 ,BRDG.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,BRDG.ACTION_CD
 ,BRDG.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
 FROM
 $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SLSCDT_ASGN_SLSTRX_NRT SLSCDT
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS BRDG
 ON SLSCDT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=BRDG.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
 WHERE SLSCDT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD = 'DR'
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  BRDG.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,SLSCDT.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY
 ORDER BY SLSCDT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM DESC)=1
